ns0:entry.ns0:title: Wei-Shaw/claude-relay-service
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Wei-Shaw/claude-relay-service
Language: javascript
CRS-自建Claude Code镜像，一站式开源中转服务，让 Claude、OpenAI、Gemini、Droid 订阅统一接入，支持拼车共享，更高效分摊成本，原生工具无缝使用。

ns0:entry.ns0:title: affaan-m/everything-claude-code
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/affaan-m/everything-claude-code
Language: javascript
The agent harness performance optimization system. Skills, instincts, memory, security, and research-first development for Claude Code, Codex, Opencode, Cursor and beyond.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: cockpit-project/cockpit
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/cockpit-project/cockpit
Language: javascript
Cockpit is a web-based graphical interface for servers.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: cv-cat/Spider_XHS
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/cv-cat/Spider_XHS
Language: javascript
小红书爬虫数据采集，小红书全域运营解决方案

ns0:entry.ns0:title: gsd-build/get-shit-done
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/gsd-build/get-shit-done
Language: javascript
A light-weight and powerful meta-prompting, context engineering and spec-driven development system for Claude Code by TÂCHES.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: jarrodwatts/claude-hud
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/jarrodwatts/claude-hud
Language: javascript
A Claude Code plugin that shows what's happening - context usage, active tools, running agents, and todo progress

ns0:entry.ns0:title: justlovemaki/AIClient-2-API
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/justlovemaki/AIClient-2-API
Language: javascript
Simulates Gemini CLI, Antigravity, Qwen Code, and Kiro client requests, compatible with the OpenAI API. It supports thousands of Gemini model requests per day and offers free use of the built-in Claude model in Kiro. Easily connect to any client via the API, making AI development more efficient!

ns0:entry.ns0:title: marktext/marktext
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/marktext/marktext
Language: javascript
📝A simple and elegant markdown editor, available for Linux, macOS and Windows.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: usebruno/bruno
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/usebruno/bruno
Language: javascript
Opensource IDE For Exploring and Testing API's (lightweight alternative to Postman/Insomnia)

ns0:entry.ns0:title: xnx3/translate
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/xnx3/translate
Language: javascript
AI i18n, Two lines of js realize automatic html translation. No need to change the page, no language configuration file, no API key, SEO friendly!
